headline: Is It Time To Reassess Ulta Beauty (ULTA) After The Recent 20% Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Ulta Beauty's current share price still reflects good value, the key question is how that price compares with the business fundamentals. The stock last closed at US$520.38, after a 3.2% decline over the past week and a 20.3% decline over the past month, while the 1 year return sits at 44.0% and the 5 year return at 57.4%. Recent headlines have focused on Ulta Beauty's position in the specialty retail space and its ability to keep attracting beauty consumers in a...
